hero.headline: SMU Online MBA in Operations and Supply Chain Management: Syllabus, Fees and Career Outcomes
hero.sub: UGC-DEB approved 2-year programme with distance-learning heritage and direct university EMI

sections.tldr: SMU Online MBA in Operations and Supply Chain Management covers logistics, supply chain integration, materials management, quality management, and global supply chain strategy. Rs 1,20,000 flat programme fee. 30% Sikkim/Northeast scholarship. Zero-cost direct university EMI. NAAC A+. Most affordable UGC-DEB approved Operations MBA in India.

about.body:
Operations and Supply Chain Management is a high-employment MBA specialisation with strong demand from e-commerce, manufacturing, FMCG, and logistics companies. India's National Logistics Policy, PLI manufacturing schemes, and e-commerce expansion are creating demand for operations managers across the value chain.

Sikkim Manipal University (SMU) is one of India's oldest distance-learning institutions, headquartered in Gangtok, Sikkim. SMU launched its online MBA arm in 2021 under UGC-DEB approval, building on a distance-education tradition spanning over two decades. NAAC A+ accredited.

SMU's Operations and Supply Chain Management MBA covers logistics and operations management, supply chain integration, materials and store management, and quality management in global supply chains. The programme addresses both the operational foundations and the strategic dimensions of supply chain management.

At Rs 1,20,000 total programme fee, SMU is the most affordable NAAC A+ online Operations MBA in India. The 30% scholarship for Sikkim and Northeast region candidates brings the net fee to Rs 84,000 for eligible applicants. EdifyEdu verifies data independently and takes no commission from any university.

syllabus.note: Sem 1-2 shared core subjects across all SMU MBA specialisations. See the main SMU Online MBA page for core subject list.

subjects.name: Project Management
subjects.desc: Operations project planning, warehouse launch management, and supply chain transformation delivery.

subjects.name: Business Strategy
subjects.desc: Operations-led competitive strategy, supply chain positioning, and make-vs-buy strategic decisions.

subjects.name: Operation and Logistics Management
subjects.desc: Freight management, multimodal transport, warehouse operations, inventory control, and 3PL coordination.

subjects.name: Supply Chain Management
subjects.desc: End-to-end supply chain design, demand planning, S&OP process, supplier management, and SC risk mitigation.

subjects.name: Banking and Insurance Management
subjects.desc: Trade finance for supply chain, cargo insurance, and BFSI compliance relevant to logistics companies.

subjects.name: Project Work
subjects.desc: Applied operations project: supply chain optimisation, logistics cost reduction, or warehouse productivity study.

subjects.name: Materials and Store Management
subjects.desc: Inventory valuation methods, ABC analysis, store layout, spare parts management, and materials requirement planning.

subjects.name: Quality Management and Global Supply Chain Management
subjects.desc: ISO 9001, Six Sigma basics, global SC integration, international trade compliance, and supplier quality audits.

whoHires.body:
Operations and Supply Chain MBA graduates from SMU are hired across India's logistics and manufacturing sectors:

**Industries:** E-commerce logistics, FMCG supply chains, 3PL companies, manufacturing, pharmaceutical logistics, retail distribution, and government logistics

**Entry-level roles:** Supply Chain Analyst, Logistics Coordinator, Warehouse Executive, Operations Executive, Procurement Analyst

**Mid-level roles (3-5 years experience):** Supply Chain Manager, Logistics Manager, Operations Manager, Warehouse Manager, Procurement Manager

**Senior roles (7+ years):** VP Supply Chain, Head of Logistics, Chief Operations Officer, Head of Procurement, VP Operations

**Top hiring organisations:** Amazon Logistics, Flipkart Supply Chain, Delhivery, Blue Dart, DTDC, Mahindra Logistics, HUL Supply Chain, ITC, Blinkit, Swiggy Instamart, Maersk India, DHL India, and manufacturing companies across Northeast India's growing industrial base

skills.body:
The Operations and Supply Chain specialisation builds skills that logistics employers test at manager level:

**Technical skills:**
- Supply Chain Planning: demand forecasting basics, safety stock calculation, replenishment cycle design, and S&OP facilitation
- Logistics Operations: route optimisation basics, warehouse layout design, freight cost benchmarking, and 3PL SLA management
- Materials Management: ABC classification, EOQ model application, MRP calculation, and inventory turnover improvement
- Quality Management: ISO 9001 documentation requirements, process capability basics, CAPA procedures, and supplier audit checklist design

**Applied skills:**
- Global Supply Chain: Incoterms interpretation, customs clearance documentation, trade finance instruments, and export-import compliance
- Procurement: vendor evaluation scoring, total cost of ownership analysis, purchase order contract terms, and supply risk register management

**Soft skills:** Presenting supply chain KPIs to operations and finance leadership, managing logistics vendor renegotiations under cost pressure, building consensus for network design changes across sales, finance, and operations stakeholders, and communicating inventory risk to CFO audiences.

comparisons.body:
Comparing SMU Online MBA Operations and Supply Chain against peer programmes:

**vs MUJ Online MBA Supply Chain Management:** MUJ has NAAC A+ and Manipal Group brand at approximately Rs 1,75,000. SMU comes from the same Manipal Group heritage at Rs 1,20,000, 31% cheaper. For candidates where Manipal Group name is important at maximum affordability, SMU is the clear choice in this head-to-head.

**vs Chandigarh Online MBA Logistics and Supply Chain Management:** CU's LSCM MBA features AI-Enabled Demand Forecasting, Quick Commerce Operations, and PwC Supply Chain advisory (Tier 2) at Rs 1,65,000 net. CU is stronger for e-commerce logistics and AI-driven roles. SMU at Rs 1,20,000 is 27% cheaper and the right choice when affordability and NAAC A+ credential are the priority.

**vs SSODL Online MBA Logistics and Supply Chain Management:** SSODL (Symbiosis) has strong brand recognition. SMU at Rs 1,20,000 is typically significantly cheaper. For candidates eligible for the 30% Northeast scholarship at Rs 84,000 net, SMU is unmatched on value in this comparison.

fees.body:
The SMU Online MBA in Operations and Supply Chain Management is priced at Rs 1,20,000 total program fee across 4 semesters (2-year programme). This fee is inclusive of all taxes, making SMU among the most affordable UGC-DEB approved online MBAs in India.

**Payment options**:
- **Semester-wise**: Rs 30,000 per semester x 4 semesters
- **Full upfront**: Rs 1,20,000 one-time

**Additional charges**:
- Application fee: Rs 500 (one-time, non-refundable at admission)
- No separate registration fee, no exam fees, no project fees

**Zero-cost EMI**: Available starting at Rs 5,000 per month directly through Sikkim Manipal University (not via external marketing partners, a differentiator vs most peer online MBAs). Contact our counsellor for current tenure options.

**Scholarships available** (non-stackable, pick one based on eligibility):
- **Sikkim and Northeast region**: 30% with valid address proof (SMU's unique regional scholarship)
- **Divyaang** (persons with disabilities): 20% with valid certificate from authorized doctor
- **Defence personnel**: 20% with Service/IC number
- **SMU alumni** (UG/PG from Sikkim Manipal University): 20%
- **Upfront payment concession**: 10% off on full/annual/semester program fee for MBA

EdifyEdu reconfirms fees and scholarships with Sikkim Manipal University each quarter. Please reconfirm current fees and eligibility with our counsellor before any payment. Fees listed are indicative.

certificate.body:
Graduates receive a Sikkim Manipal University MBA degree certificate with Operations and Supply Chain Management noted on the marksheet, issued under UGC-DEB 2020 online mode standards. The degree carries the SMU name, NAAC A+ accredited with decades of distance-learning recognition.

DigiLocker verification is available. UGC-DEB 2020 compliance ensures the degree is valid for operations manager roles at logistics companies, manufacturing firms, and government supply chain projects.

reviews.intro: Three verified reviews from SMU Online MBA Operations and Supply Chain Management alumni. Ratings reflect individual experience.

items.name: Suresh K.
items.liked: 30% Northeast scholarship made NAAC A+ Operations MBA cost Rs 84,000 total
items.disliked: AI-specific supply chain content like demand sensing and quick commerce was not covered
items.body: I work in logistics in Assam and the 30% Northeast scholarship reduced my cost to Rs 84,000 for a NAAC A+ Operations MBA. Supply Chain Management covered end-to-end SC design and demand planning practically. Materials Management subject helped me implement ABC analysis at our warehouse. Zero-cost EMI through SMU directly was smooth. SMU's credential was accepted without issue by our logistics company's HR for my manager promotion application.

items.name: Ramesh P.
items.liked: Quality Management subject covered ISO 9001 and Six Sigma basics I needed for my manufacturing role
items.disliked: E-commerce and last-mile logistics content was missing given current industry trends
items.body: I compared SMU with Chandigarh and MUJ for Operations MBA. SMU was Rs 45,000-55,000 cheaper. For my manufacturing logistics role, the Quality Management and Global Supply Chain subjects were the key content I needed. ISO 9001 documentation and supplier audit skills were directly applicable. Zero-cost EMI and flat fee with no hidden charges made budgeting straightforward. Good value for operations professionals not targeting e-commerce logistics roles.

items.name: Anita M.
items.liked: Most affordable NAAC A+ Operations MBA with unique Northeast scholarship
items.disliked: Faculty interaction was limited; relied on self-study materials for most subjects
items.body: As a Northeast candidate the Rs 84,000 net fee with 30% scholarship was the key decision factor. The Operations and Logistics content covered warehousing and inventory management practically. However, the learning experience is largely self-paced with limited live sessions. For self-directed learners who need an affordable management credential to advance in operations or logistics, SMU delivers solid value. For those needing active mentorship, look at higher-priced alternatives.

faqs.question: What is SMU's 30% scholarship for Sikkim and Northeast region candidates?
faqs.answer: SMU offers a 30% fee scholarship exclusively for candidates with a valid residential address in Sikkim or any Northeast state (Arunachal Pradesh, Assam, Manipur, Meghalaya, Mizoram, Nagaland, Tripura). Valid address proof such as Aadhaar, voter ID, or utility bill is required at admission. This scholarship is non-stackable. At 30% off, the Rs 1,20,000 fee becomes Rs 84,000 net, making it the most affordable NAAC A+ online Operations MBA in India.

faqs.question: Is SMU Online MBA Operations cheaper than MUJ, Chandigarh, and SSODL?
faqs.answer: Yes. SMU is Rs 1,20,000 total, which is 31% cheaper than MUJ (approx Rs 1,75,000), 27% cheaper than Chandigarh (Rs 1,65,000 Tier 1), and significantly cheaper than SSODL. With the 30% Northeast scholarship, the net fee drops to Rs 84,000. All are NAAC A+ and UGC-DEB approved. SMU wins on pure affordability.

faqs.question: Does SMU offer zero-cost EMI?
faqs.answer: Yes. SMU offers zero-cost EMI starting at Rs 5,000 per month directly through Sikkim Manipal University's own payment system, not through external marketing partners or NBFCs. This is the same university-direct EMI model offered by MUJ and NMIMS. Confirm current tenure options with our counsellor.

faqs.question: Does the programme cover quality management certifications?
faqs.answer: Quality Management and Global Supply Chain Management in Sem 4 covers ISO 9001 documentation, Six Sigma process improvement basics, supplier audit procedures, and CAPA frameworks. This is preparatory knowledge for ISO 9001 Lead Auditor certifications and quality management roles in manufacturing and logistics. A separate ISO or Six Sigma certification alongside the MBA adds professional quality credentials.

faqs.question: Is this MBA useful for operations roles in Northeast India's industrial growth?
faqs.answer: Yes. Northeast India's industrial base is growing through central government schemes including PLI and Act East Policy infrastructure investment. Operations and Supply Chain management skills are in demand for manufacturing, logistics, and infrastructure projects in the region. SMU's legacy presence in the Northeast and NAAC A+ credential give the degree strong regional recognition for operations management roles.

chooseIf: You want the most affordable NAAC A+ Operations MBA in India at Rs 1,20,000 flat.
You are from Sikkim or the Northeast and qualify for the 30% regional scholarship (net fee Rs 84,000).
You prefer zero-cost EMI directly through the university.
You value SMU's NAAC A+ credential for operations roles in Northeast India's growing industrial sector.
consider: You need AI-driven supply chain, quick commerce, or digital logistics curriculum (consider Chandigarh).
You want PwC Supply Chain advisory content and stronger employer branding (consider Chandigarh or MUJ).
You need a large pan-India placement network for e-commerce logistics companies (consider Amity or MUJ).
